sent.title: Happy Future Birthday!
sent.text_message:
Dear future me,

Another year has passed! I hope you're celebrating this birthday with joy and surrounded by the people you love. Here's what I want you to remember from this year...

sent.title: Advice
sent.text_message:
Hello future self!

I've learned some important lessons recently that I want to share with you. These insights might help you navigate whatever you're facing...

sent.title: Milestone

Dear future me,

Today I reached an important milestone! I wanted to capture this moment of accomplishment and share the journey that led me here...

sent.title: Inspire
sent.text_message:
Hey champion!

I know life can be challenging sometimes, so I'm sending you this message of encouragement from the past. Remember how strong and capable you are...

💭 **What I'm Really Feeling:**

These words matter because you matter. Your thoughts, feelings, and experiences are valid and valuable.

---

💝 Writing this feels vulnerable, like opening a window to my soul.

🌟 May you receive this with the same openness it was given. Connection is the gift we give ourselves.
